titleStmt.title: SII 6.896: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 896. (A.R. No. 290 of 1899). IN THE TWENTY-SECOND NICHE OF THE SAME VERANDAH. Now built into a modern masonry wall.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . bhāradvājānvayē jātaḥ pū¨rvvaṁ rāghavanāyakaḥ svavaṁśavṛddhy£ai nṛharē ḥ śrījaya
ṁttimahōtsavē [. 1*] guḍamiśratilasphītanaivēdyaṁ samakalpayat pautrastu tasya bhūyōpi puruṣōtta
manāyakaḥ svāyurā rōgyasaṁttāna kī¨rttisaṁppat samṛddhayē [. 2*] śākābdē ratnakhākṣi kṣitiparigaṇitē pālgu
ṇē māsi śukladvādaśyāṁ bhānuvārē naraharibhavanē gaṁḍasanniṣkayugmaṁ . prādādācaṁdratāraṁ haridha
raṇidharādhī śituḥśrījayaṁ ttījātaḥ śrīkṛṣṇamū¨rttē¨rvvividharasalasat bhūrinaivēdyahētōḥ . [. 3*] sugandhisau
gandhikapuṣpamālāḥ śrīmannṛsiṁhasya sama¨rppaṇāya dadau harērāyatanē sa Ēva sā¨rddhaṁ suniṣkadvayamātma
bhūtyai [. 4*] svasti śrīśakavaruṣaṁbulu 1209 gunēṁṭṭi pālguṇa śukla dvādaśiyu Ādivāramunāṁ
ḍu śrīnarasiṁhyanāthuni śrījayaṁttimahōtsavamunaku rāghavanāyakuṁḍu cēsina dha¨rmmuvu mīṁ
dda vīrimanumaṁḍu puruṣōttamanāyakuṁḍu tamaku Āyuṣkāmā¨rtthasiddhigā śrījayaṁttināṁṭi rātri śrīnarasiṁ
hyanāthuniki Āragiṁppanaivēdyamulu Appālu ḍalaṟu pāyasālulōpaina vastulaku śrībhaṁḍāramu
na Oḍuku gaṁḍamāḍalu reṁḍu Ī pūrāInāyakuṁḍu tanaku saṁttānābhivriddhigā śrīnarasiṁhyanāthuniki nityamu
ceṁggalvamāla sama[¨r*]ppicchaṭi nibaṁddha Okaṭṭiki śrībhaṁḍuramuna Oḍuku mallamāḍa Okaṁḍunu cinnālu Āṟu
Ī dha¨rmmu śrīvaiṣṇavula rakṣa śatruṇāpi kṛtō dha¨rmmaḥ pālanīyō manīṣibhiḥ śatrurēva hi(ḥ) śatruḥ syādda¨rma
ḥ śatru¨rnna ka(ḥ)syacit .
Digital edition of SII 6.896 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
